personal.name: Quoc Ngoc Bui
personal.title: Software Developer
personal.about: Software Developer with 4+ years of hands-on experience developing and maintaining web applications. Experienced with C#, .NET Framework, .NET Core, Angular, React, TypeScript, and T-SQL. Strong background in production environments and application development lifecycle. Go-to person for payment gateway implementation and critical system issues. Seeking to apply expertise in modernizing and supporting core application platforms.

experience.title: Software Developer
experience.description: Owned end-to-end design, development, architecture and maintenance of payment gateway platform integrating 22+ payment integrations across C#/.NET stack. Led Payment Gateway Framework project designing and developing secure payment integrations. Architected and delivered .NET 8 migration for legacy systems with full CI/CD pipeline remediation across Azure DevOps. Implemented JWT, OAuth, and AES encryption to protect sensitive payment data. Maintained unit and integration test suites under Agile sprints. Designed and documented REST APIs as integration layer. Built and maintained web frontend features using React, TypeScript, and AngularJS for production enterprise applications.

experience.title: Cybersecurity Analyst / VAPT Assistant
experience.description: Performed penetration testing and vulnerability assessments for a contractor, applying security analysis across networked systems and applications.

experience.title: Application Developer
experience.description: Developed WinForms applications with C# .NET Framework using Microsoft Visual Studio. Designed and executed complex SQL queries using Microsoft SQL Server. Developed RESTful APIs and JSON data structures using .NET framework for client-server communication.

projects.name: Resume Defense Game
projects.description: Interactive pixel-art game demonstrating web development skills. Features real-time combat gameplay, persistent damage mechanics, and responsive design with hotkey controls.

projects.name: Professional Portfolio
projects.description: JSON-driven portfolio website with responsive design. Dynamically loads resume data for easy updates without code changes.

projects.name: Payment Gateway Platform
projects.description: Designed and developed secure payment integration platform supporting 22+ payment services using C# .NET stack with JWT, OAuth, and AES encryption.

education.degree: Online Doctor of Philosophy (PhD) in Computer Science
education.field: Software Engineering, Machine Learning, Requirement Engineering, Software Security
education.school: Bagley College of Engineering, Mississippi State University

education.degree: Master of Science in Cyber Operations
